paper_quote: Wolfram set {π, e, i, ln, +, ×, ∧}; complex extension admits full pow and the imaginary unit.
informal_pl: Generalizacja chunku 024: redukcja Wolfram → Calc 3 z pełnym pow w ℂ; pow a b = exp(b·log a) na głównej gałęzi.
informal_en: Generalises chunk 024: Wolfram → Calc 3 reduction with full pow in ℂ; pow a b = exp(b·log a) on the principal branch.
lean_target_signature: theorem wolframℂ_to_calc3ℂ (e : Wolframℂ) : ∀ z : ℂ, z ≠ 0 → ∃ e' : Calc3ℂ, Calc3ℂ.eval z e' = Wolframℂ.eval z e := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; broader claim from §1.4 of the supplement. Branch-cut bookkeeping is the chief obstacle. Inherits chunks 034/035 permanent-sorry risks.
